result.description: Minami Restaurant is a Japanese restaurant located in the vibrant neighborhood of Yaletown, Vancouver. It offers a combination of Japanese and West Coast cuisine in a comfortable, rustic atmosphere. The restaurant is known for its unique and innovative dining experience, and its menu features a variety of dishes, including sushi, seafood, and meat options. Minami has received positive reviews from customers and critics alike, and is considered one of the top Japanese restaurants in Vancouver.
